name: Carey LaMothe
bio: Carey LaMothe is a graduate of the University of Washington, where she earned her degree in French Horn performance studying with David Kappy. While living in Los Angeles, Carey taught elementary school band and lessons in French horn, trumpet, trombone, euphonium, and piano. She went on tour and recorded with L.A. bands including String Theory Productions and Under the Covers, Vol. 1, a collaboration between alternative rock artist Matthew Sweet and Bangles singer/guitarist Susanna Hoffs. She plays regularly with the Lake Washington Civic Orchestra, Harmonia Orchestra & Chorus, The Sound Ensemble, and more. Her Brass Quintet performed several recitals including a collaboration with Organ last summer. You can also catch Carey playing trumpet in the Amazon Jazz Band.
